description: Okay, I've got an important problem for you to work on. We need to have really good on-device text-to-speech. So set that up. I think we did it before in the ATG monorepo, and I think also potentially somewhere else. But yeah, basically use an open-source text-to-speech model. This one's way better than the built-in iOS text-to-speech. So use a much better one of that. We may in the future end up pushing that off device, but for now, I think just on here is okay.
